offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation of insurance premium payments is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for brokers
try_it: Let users try error notification system and manual entry option for exceptions on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
